databaseTree.tables: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS TableName FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE';
databaseTree.views: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS ViewName FROM information_schema.views WHERE table_schema = DATABASE();
databaseTree.procedures: SELECT ROUTINE_NAME AS ProcedureName FROM information_schema.routines WHERE routine_schema = DATABASE() AND routine_type = 'PROCEDURE';

searchPick.tables: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS TableName FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE';
searchPick.views: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS ViewName FROM information_schema.views WHERE table_schema = DATABASE();
searchPick.procedures: SELECT ROUTINE_NAME AS ProcedureName FROM information_schema.routines WHERE routine_schema = DATABASE() AND routine_type = 'PROCEDURE';

databaseObject.view: SELECT VIEW_DEFINITION AS ViewDefinition FROM information_schema.views WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = $viewName;
databaseObject.procedure: SELECT ROUTINE_DEFINITION AS ProcedureDefinition FROM information_schema.routines WHERE routine_schema = DATABASE() AND routine_name = $procedureName;
